docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORTON, ALFONZ AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, BRANDON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ALLEANZA ASSOCIATES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
